items.title: Make Windows child-process execution hidden by construction
items.insight: The repo had many script surfaces that could import child_process directly, preserving the window-storm failure mode that makes Windows sessions unusable. A safe-spawn wrapper plus a guard converts the rule from a remembered convention into an executable invariant.
items.recipe: Route spawn-family calls through scripts/lib/safe-spawn.mjs, enforce no raw child_process imports with scripts/check-windows-hide.mjs, and keep the guard in the Studio verification surface.
premiseEvidence: scripts/check-windows-hide.mjs exits 0 with zero direct child_process imports

items.title: Enforce in-session Wave lists across durable agent surfaces
items.insight: CANON-044 only works if every agent-facing surface compels the behavior before closeout. The new guard originally proved the protocol copy was missing the mandate; the session fixed the source surface instead of weakening the guard.
items.recipe: Add scripts/check-canon-044-waves.mjs, carry the Wave mandate in AGENTS.md and docs/SESSION_PROTOCOL.md, and verify both surfaces before closeout.
premiseEvidence: docs/SESSION_PROTOCOL.md now contains the CANON-044 Wave-list preflight bullet

items.title: Preserve truthful blocker and task-board parsing while adding richer rules
items.insight: The broader blocker taxonomy initially regressed two live contracts: older task-board tables parsed to zero items, and GitHub Pages repo-secret work lost its agent-attemptable probe. Fixing the parser and classifier keeps CANON-019 honest because agent-runnable work stays visible as runnable.
items.recipe: Restore table/checklist fallback parsing, accept both bold and plain Human Action bullets, and add a GitHub Pages repo-secret blocker rule before the generic GitHub rule.
premiseEvidence: npm run test:studio initially failed task-board parser and blocker classifier tests
scripts/lib/task-board.mjs now supports Unified Genius List plus legacy tables/checklists
scripts/lib/blocker-rules.mjs maps GitHub Pages repo secrets to github.repo and gh auth status

items.title: Centralize context verdicts and dual-axis SIL telemetry
items.insight: Context-meter verdicts and SIL scoring are high-trust routing surfaces, so drift there is more expensive than an ordinary script bug. The new shared verdict library, cost ledger rollup, and SIL v6 scaffold make the repo show honest context and impact signals without replacing the existing SIL v3 contract.
items.recipe: Add scripts/lib/context-verdicts.mjs, scripts/cache-ledger-rollup.mjs, scripts/lib/sil-v6.mjs, and write-project-status invariant hooks; leave Impact at zero until real adoption signals are wired.
premiseEvidence: node scripts/context-meter.mjs --json returns CONTINUE with measured ledger data
node scripts/lib/sil-v6.mjs --repo-root . --medium infrastructure --json reports Health 796/1000 and Impact 0/1000 with needs-instrumentation rows

skipped.reason: Live doctor still shows the domain repair as Cloudflare/DNS-side and not auto-ready from this repo; keeping it explicit is more honest than force-greening deployment reachability.

executionLog.evidence: studio shard failures fixed without test relaxation
context-meter and SIL v6 probes run; Impact remains honestly uninstrumented
